title: Belief: The Possession of Janet Moses
original_title: Belief: The Possession of Janet Moses
overview: This impressive doco disperses the fog of shame and sensationalism to shed light on the tragedy that made international headlines in 2007 when a young Wainuiomata woman died during a mākutu lifting.
